children.heading: Commercial use authorization
children.label: 1 Commercial use authorization
children.text: The term “commercial use authorization” means a commercial use authorization to provide services to visitors to units of the National Park System under subchapter II of chapter 1019 of title 54.

children.label: A
children.text: uses 2 or more units of Federal recreational lands and waters; and

children.label: B
children.text: is under the jurisdiction of 2 or more Federal land management agencies.

children.heading: Recreation service provider
children.label: 3 Recreation service provider
children.text: The term “recreation service provider” has the meaning given the term in (as amended by section 311).section 6801 of this title

children.heading: Special recreation permit
children.label: 4 Special recreation permit
children.text: The term “special recreation permit” has the meaning given the term in (as amended by section 311).section 6801 of this title

children.heading: Visitor-use day
children.label: 5 Visitor-use day
children.text: The term “visitor-use day” means a visitor-use day, user day, launch, or other metric used by the Secretary concerned for purposes of authorizing use under a special recreation permit.
